title: ZIMURINDA v. MUSABYIMANA N’ABANDI
text:
ZIMURINDA v. MUSABYIMANA N’ABANDI
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RCAA 00003/2023/CA, (Kamere, P.J.,) 28
Ugushyingo 2025]
Amasezerano – Amasezerano y’ubwumvikane – Amasezerano y’ubwumvikane agira agaciro iyo
ashyizweho umukono n’ababuranyi bose, akaba akemuye ibibazo byose bari bafitanye, asoza
urabanza, akaba kandi agomba kubahirizwa.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Bizimungu Daniel, Kabataka Fulgence na Dushimimana Immaculée bareze
mu rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Karongi Musabyimana Chrisostome izungura ry’isambu ya
nyirarume Bufigi, ifite agaciro k’amafaranga 127,024,299 hamwe n’indishyi zingana
n’amafaranga 25,000,000.
Muri uru rubanza harezwe kandi Mutabaruka Rosette, Mutabaruka Dieudonné, Ngendahayo Fils
Mutabaruka Esperée, Mutabaruka Gracia, Mutabaruka Clementine, Mutabaruka Victoire,
Mukabarema, hanagoboka Nyirimanzi Mathias, KOPERATIVE KOAIM, na Ntabanganyimana
Justin.
Basobanuye ko Musabyimana Chrisostome, Bizimungu daniel, Kabataka Fulgence bavukana kuri
se Kajuga na nyina Nyiramajangwe.Bizimungu akaba yararegaga Musabyimana Chrisostome ko
yagiye kuburana imitungo ya nyirarume witwa Bufigi uvukana na Nyiramajangwe, nyina ubabyara
ayiburanira umuryango, ngo arangije kuyitsindira ayigira iye.
Mu rubanza hagobokeshejwemo abagiye bagura na Musabyimana barimo Nyirimanzi,
Cooperative yitwa KOAIM SURE na Ntabanganyimana, bo bavuga ko baguze nta buriganya
babona umutungo ari uwe.
Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ikirego cya Bizimungu Daniel,
Dushimimana Immaculée na Kabataka Fulgence cyakiriwe kandi gifite ishingiro, bityo ko isambu
Musabyimana yatsindiye mu rubanza RCA 229/73/2002, yaburanye na Kaperu nyinawabo,
aburana inyungu za nyina Nyiramajangwe agatsinda, imitungo atunze akomora kuri uru rubanza
agomba kuyigabana n’abo bavukana kuri Nyiramajangwe ku buryo bungana.
Rwemeje ko abantu baguze ubutaka na Musabyimana Chrisostome bakaba baranagobotse muri
uru rubanza, bafite ibikorwa kuri ubu butaka bwari butunzwe na Musabyimana Chrisostome,
bagomba kubugumana, hakarebwa niba hataba hangana n’umugabane Musabyimana yabona
bagabana, haba hato agasubiza amafaranga agaragara mu cyemezo cy’igenagaciro aba batsinze
bakoresheje rya mbere, agasubizwa umuryango wa Nyiramajangwe.
Rwategetse ko ubu butaka Musabyimana yari atunze bugabanwa, aho badashobora kugabana mu
buryo buringaniza cyangwa se amategeko atemera ko hacibwaho uduce, bakaba badashobora no
kuhatungira hamwe; hakagurishwa amafaranga avuye akaba ariyo agabanwa.

Rwemeje kandi ko indishyi mbonezamusaruro Bizimungu Daniel yasabye atabashije
kuzisobanura,bityo akaba ntazo yemerewe.
Musabyimana Chrisostome ntiyishimiye icyemezo cy’urukiko ajuririra mu Rukiko Rukuru
Urugereko rwa Rusizi, anenga ko urukiko rwaciye urubanza rushingiye ububasha bwarwo ku
mitungo adafite. Urukiko Rukuru Urugereko rwa Rusizi rwemeje ko ikirego cya Mukamugema
Feresita gifite ishingiro
Zimurinda Charles ntiyishimiye imikirize y’urwo rubanza ayijuririra mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire,
ababuranyi baritabye kandi bunganiwe nka mbere, bemeranwa n’Urukiko ko hahita hatangira
kugeragezwa inzira yo gukemura mu bwumvikane amakimbirane bafitanye, kandi umucamanza
wagombaga kubaburanisha abibaberamo umuhuza.
Ku wa 07/11/2025, ubuhuza bwakomereje ku cyicaro cy’Urukiko buyobowe n’umucamanza, hari
ababuranyi bose uretse uhagarariye KOAIMU SURE wari urwaye. Kuri uwo munsi ababuranyi
bageze ku bwumvikane ku ngingo zose zaburanwagaho muri uru rubanza maze hamwe n’umuhuza
abitabiriye ubuhuza bose kuri uwo munsi bashyira umukono ku nyandiko yiswe “Inyandiko
y’ubwumvikane mu buhuza burangiza urubanza RCAA 00003/2023/CA.
Muri ayo masezerano ababuranyi bumvikanye ko Zimurinda yemeye guha umuryango wa
Mushirarungu uhagarariwe na Kandamutsa Beata amafaranga miliyoni enye z’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda (4.000.000Frw), akanatanga umurima uzahabwa umukobwa wa mukuru we witwa
Nyiranshimiyimana Esperance, bitarenze tariki 05/04/2026.
Muri aya masezerano kandi humvikanwe ko ubu bwumvikane busoje burundu imanza zari
zishingiye kw’izugura ry’isambu ya Bufigi ari zo: RCAA 00003/2023; RC 00001/2021/HC/RSZ;
RC 00039/2019/HC/RSZ; RC 00056/2018/TGI/KNG na RC 7256/R31-RCA 0217/04/TP/KBY.
Urukiko rwamenyeshereje ababuranyi ahabugenewe muri sisitemu ya IECMS ko isomwa mu
ruhame ry’icyemezo gisoza uru rubanza rishyizwe ku wa 28/11/2025.
Hasuzumwe ikibazo cyo Kumenya niba Urukiko rwaha agaciro amasezerano y’ubwumvikane mu
buhuza bwabaye ku wa 07/11/2025 hagati y’ababuranyi bose muri uru rubanza.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Amasezerano y’ubwumvikane agira agaciro iyo ashyizweho umukono
n’ababuranyi bose, akaba akemuye ibibazo byose bari bafitanye, asoza urabanza, akaba kandi
agomba kubahirizwa.
Ubwumvikane bwasojwe bunashyirwaho umukono ku wa 07/11/2025 hagati y’ababuranyi
bose muri uru rubanza busoje burundu urubanza RCAA 00003/2023/CA.
Amategeko yashingiweho:

Itegeko Nº 45/2011 ryo ku wa 25/11/2011 rigenga amasezerano, ingingo ya 64.
Nta manza zifashishijwe.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Urubanza rwatangiriye mu rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Karongi, Bizimungu Daniel, Kabataka
Fulgence na Dushimimana Immaculée barega Musabyimana Chrisostome izungura ry’isambu ya
nyirarume Bufigi, ifite agaciro k’amafaranga 127,024,299 hamwe n’indishyi zingana
n’amafaranga 25,000,000. Muri uru rubanza harezwe kandi Mutabaruka Rosette, Mutabaruka
Dieudonné, Ngendahayo Fils Mutabaruka Esperée, Mutabaruka Gracia, Mutabaruka Clementine,
Mutabaruka Victoire, Mukabarema, hanagoboka Nyirimanzi Mathias, KOPERATIVE KOAIM,
na Ntabanganyimana Justin.
[2] Basobanuye ko Musabyimana Chrisostome, Bizimungu daniel, Kabataka Fulgence
bavukana kuri se Kajuga na nyina Nyiramajangwe.Bizimungu akaba yararegaga Musabyimana
Chrisostome ko yagiye kuburana imitungo ya nyirarume witwa Bufigi uvukana na
Nyiramajangwe, nyina ubabyara ayiburanira umuryango, ngo arangije kuyitsindira ayigira iye.
[3] Mu rubanza kandi bareze n’abana b’umuvandimwe wabo Mutabaruka, ariko nabo nubwo
basa n’abaregwa bavuga ko Musabyimana Chrisostome abahuguza ko bakabaye bose bagabana.
Musabyimana Chrisostome yaburanye avuga ko isambu ari iye kuko imwanditseho kandi ko
ikomoka kuri nyirarume Bufigi, bose ngo akaba ntawe ufite uburenganzira bwo kumuzungura,
kuko yazunguwe, isambu afite rero ngo nawe yayikomoye ku bazungura ba Bufigi, ngo
ntiyayibonye kubera nyina.
[4] Mu rubanza hagobokeshejwemo abagiye bagura na Musabyimana barimo Nyirimanzi,
Cooperative yitwa KOAIM SURE na Ntabanganyimana, bo bavuga ko baguze nta buriganya
babona umutungo ari uwe, ko barenganurwa.
[5] Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko ikirego cya Bizimungu Daniel,
Dushimimana Immaculée na Kabataka Fulgence cyakiriwe kandi gifite ishingiro, ko isambu
Musabyimana yatsindiye mu rubanza RCA 229/73/2002, yaburanye na Kaperu nyinawabo,
aburana inyungu za nyina Nyiramajangwe agatsinda, imitungo atunze akomora kuri uru rubanza
agomba kuyigabana n’abo bavukana kuri Nyiramajangwe ku buryo bungana; ni ukuvuga
Bizimungu Daniel, Dushimimana mu mwanya wa Kanyange uvukana n’aba ba Bizimungu,
Kabataka Fulgence, Nyiranshuti Belansira mu mwanya wa Kayumba uvukana na Bizimungu,
Musabyimana Chrisostome na Mutabaruka uhagariwe n’umuryango we. Rwemeje ko abantu
baguze ubutaka na Musabyimana Chrisostome bakaba baranagobotse muri uru rubanza, bafite
ibikorwa kuri ubu butaka bwari butunzwe na Musabyimana Chrisostome, bagomba kubugumana,
hakarebwa niba hataba hangana n’umugabane Musabyimana yabona bagabana, haba hato
agasubiza amafaranga agaragara mu cyemezo cy’igenagaciro aba batsinze bakoresheje rya mbere
(ryo mu kwezi kwa 04/2017), agasubizwa umuryango wa Nyiramajangwe.

Rwategetse ko ubu butaka Musabyimana yari atunze bugabanwa, aho badashobora kugabana mu
buryo buringaniza cyangwa se amategeko atemera ko hacibwaho uduce, bakaba badashobora no
kuhatungira hamwe; hakagurishwa amafaranga avuye akaba ariyo agabanwa. Rwemeje ko indishyi
mbonezamusaruro Bizimungu Daniel yasabye atabashije kuzisobanura, akaba ntazo yemerewe.
Rwategetse Musabyimana Chrisostome gusubiza Bizimungu Daniel n’abo ahagarariye, igarama
batanze rya 20.000 frw.
[6] Musabyimana Chrisostome ntiyishimiye icyemezo cy’urukiko ajuririra urukiko Rukuru
Urugereko rwa Rusizi rukorera i Karongi, ikirego gihabwa RCA 00039/2019/HC/RSZ ,yajuriye
anenga urubanza, ko urukiko rwaciye urubanza rushingiye ububasha bwarwo ku mitungo adafite,
ngo abo baburana bagaragaje agaciro kangana n’amafaranga 127.024.299, mu kuburana urukiko
ubwarwo rwemeza ko bimwe mubyo yarezwe hari abandi babitunze ndetse ko n’ibiri hejuru
y’ubutaka ari ibyabo, ngo akaba asanga rwaragombaga gusuzuma ibyo akwiriye kwiregura ho,
ngo kuko atari akwiye kwiregura ku mitungo y’abandi.
[7] Ikindi ngo nuko igenagaciro yakoresheje rigaragaza ko imitungo iburanwa ifite agaciro
k’amafaranga 12.732.000, ngo akaba asanga urubanza rwari gutangirira mu rukiko rw’Ibanze.
Akomeza avuga ko anenga urubanza kandi ko urukiko mu kuburanisha rwahinduye icyaregewe,
ngo abareze batanze ikirego cyo kuzungura isambu ya nyirarume Bufigi, mu isesengura
ry’urubanza urukiko ruvuga ko akwiye kugabana n’abaregaga, ngo kandi atariwe muzungura wa
Bufigi wazunguye iyo sambu. Avuga ko umuzungura wa Bufigi ari umwuzukuru we witwa
Zimurinda akaba ari nawe wafashe inshingano zo kuzungura 100% uwo mutungo ngo kuko nta
wundi wari imbere ye mu izungura. Na none kandi ngo mu rubanza rujuririrwa urukiko
rwirengagije ibimenyetso yarugaragarije bigaragaza aho akomora amasambu atunze,
n’ubusobanuro yatanze kubigendanye n’urubanza bavuze ko yaburanye ku giti cye no mu izina
rye, ngo atanga n’igarama mu izina rye, ntawe ahagarariye, ibi ngo bikaba bitandukanye
n’ibyavuzwe n’urukiko mu rubanza rujuririrwa aho rwavuze ko yari ahagarariye umuryango,
nyamara ngo atari awuhagariye.
Anenga kandi urubanza ko urukiko rwamuciye amafaranga kandi yaragurishije abavandimwe
bareba, ngo ntibatambamira icyo gikorwa kugeza nubwo abo yagurishije bubatse ku butaka baguze
nabwo nti babitambamira.
[8] Mukamugema Feresita mwene Kajuga na Nyiramajangwe Adeline utari warabaye
umuburanyi muri urwo rubanza, yaje kurutambamira avuga ko ashaka nawe umugabane akomora
kuri nyina Nyiramajangwe Adeline, kuko ababuranye ziriya manza bamuheje ntibamumenyesha
ko baburanye kuzungura umutungo wa nyina Nyiramajangwe Adeline. Avuga ko uru rubanza
atigeze arumenya cyangwa ngo ababurana barumumenyeshe, kandi inyungu zaburanwaga ari iza
nyina Nyiramajangwe, akaba nawe yari afite uburenganzira bungana n’abandi bakomoka kuri
Nyiramajangwe, nyamara ubu burenganzira bwe ngo bwarabangamiwe kuko atamenyeshejwe
urubanza bituma mu cyemezo cy’urukiko ntacyo yavuzweho. Avuga ko urubanza rwaciwe kuwa
18/09/2020 arumenya kuwa09/11/2020 aruko abonye umuhesha w’inkiko aje kurangiza urubanza
rw’ibintu afitemo inyungu, yibaza ukuntu abantu bagiye kuburana bonyine umutungo bahuriyeho
asanga ari ukumuvutsa uburenganzira bwe yemerwa n’amategeko.
[9] Etienne Bikorimana wagobotse ku bushake yavuze ko muri izi manza zombi we
n’abavandimwe be ahagarariye aribo Uzabumwana Fidele na Nyiramugisha Monique bari

bahagariwe na nyina ubabyara ariwe Nyiranshuti Belancille, mu ntegura rubanza y’urubanza RC
00001/2021/HC/RSZ, Musabyimana Chrisostome ngo yatanze inzitizi avuga ko nyina
ntaburenganzira afite bwo kuzungura, bibangombwa ko bagoboka kuko uburenganzira
Mukamugema Feresita afite bungana n’ubwase Kayumba kuko ari umwana wa Nyiramajangwe.
[10] Musabyimana Chrisostome yavuze ko imirima iburanwa atari iya nyina Nyiramajangwe,
ahubwo ari iya Nyirarume witwaga Bufigi kuko mu manza zose zagiye zikomozwaho, baburanaga
umutungo wa Nyirarume Bufigi, bityo ko urubanza rwatambamiwe rugomba guhinduka, bityo
hakemezwa ko nta mutungo cyangwa imirima yo kuzungurwa yasizwe na Nyiramajangwe.
[11] Uwagobokeshekwe ku gahato ariwe Zimurinda Charles akaba ariwe mwuzukuru rukumbi
wa Bufigi kugeza ubu uzwi ko akiriho, nawe yunze murya Musabyimana Chrisostome, ndetse
akavuga ko ibyasekuru yamaze kubishyikira ndetse akaba yarahembye Musabyimana Chrisostome
imirima itandukanye kubera ko yamufashije kugaruza imirima ya sekuru.
[12] Mukabarema Esperance nawe niko abyumva ariko asaba ko urukiko rubibonye ukundi
hazakurikizwa izungura uko rikorwa.
[13] Ntabanganyimana Justin, Nyirimanzi Mathias, bavuga ko baguze amasambu na
Musabyimana Chrisostome abanje kubereka ko ariwe nyiri umutungo, bityo ko basaba ko
bakomeza gutunga ariya masambu baguze nta buryarya.
[14] Ku wa23/02/2023, Urukiko Rukuru Urugereko rwa Rusizi rwakijie ko:
- ikirego cya Mukamugema Feresita gifite ishingiro
- umutungo uburanwa ukomoka kuri Musaza ukaba uri mu Kagari ka Ruhinge, Umurenge
wa Rukaragata, Akarere ka Rutsiro ugomba kugabanywamo kabiri mu buryo bungana
abazungura ba Musaza aribo: Nyiramajangwe na Bufigi.
-uruhare rwa Bufigi ruherera kuri Zimurinda Charles nk’umuzungura rukumbi uzwi
wasigaye, uruhare rwa Nyiramajangwe rugaherera ku bazungura be, Musabyimana
Chrisostome agomba kuyigabana n`abo bavukana kuri Nyiramajangwe ku buryo bungana
aribo: Mukabarema, Kabataka Fulgence, Bizimungu Daniel, Mukamugema Feresita, mu
mwanya wa Kayumba ni Etienne Bikorimana, Uzabumwana Fidele, Nyiramugisha
Monique, mu mwanya wa Kanyange uvukana n`aba ba Bizimungu ni Dushimimana
Immaculee na Mutabaruka Esperee n’abo ahagarariye aribo Mutabaruka Dieudonné,
Mutabaruka Rosette, Mutabaruka Clementine, Mutabaruka Desiré, M Nyiramajangwe
victoire, Mutabaruka Grasiya .
- abantu baguze ubutaka na Musabyimana Chrisostome, bafite ibikorwa kuri ubwo butaka
bwari butunzwe na Musabyimana, bagomba kubugumana; hakarebwa niba hataba hangana
n`umugabane Musabyimana yabona bagabana, yaba yaragurishije aharenze umugabane
we, igice kirenzeho kigahabwa agaciro mu mafaranga, agasubizwa umuryango wa
Nyiramajangwe, yaba aho yagurishije ari hato, agahabwa igice gisigaye.
-muri ibyo byose aho badashobora kugabana mu buryo buringaniza cyangwa se amategeko
atemera ko hacibwaho uduce, bakaba badashobora no kuhatungira hamwe; hagomba
kugurishwa amafaranga avuyemo akaba ariyo agabanwa.

-indishyi zasabwe n’impande ziburanwa ntazitanzwe kuko zitasobanuwe kandi no kuba
buri ruhande rwagize ibyo rutsindira n’ibindi rutsindirwa.
-ibyemejwe byose kumitungo yagaragajwe bitandukanye n’ibyemejwe n’uru rubanza
biteshejwe agaciro.
[15] Zimurinda Charles ntiyishimiye imikirize y’urwo rubanza ayijuririra mu Rukiko
rw’Ubujurire, ubujurire bwe bwandikwa kuri RCA 00003/2023/CA. Mu iburanisha rya mbere ku
wa 06/01/2025, Zimurinda Charles yunganiwe na Me Nsengiyumva Eugene, Me Rusagara
Innocent ahagarariye Mukamugema Felicite na Mukabarema, Musabyimana Chrisostome
yunganiwe na Me Niyonsaba Elie, Me Itangibihozo Zachee yunganiye Bikorimana Etienne wari
unahagarariye Uzabumwana Fidele na Nyiramugisha Monique , yunganiye kandi Bizimungu
Daniel wari unahagarariye Dushimimana Immaculee na Kabataka Fulgence, akanuganira
Mutabaruka Esperee wari unahagarariye abandi bene Mutabaruka batanu; naho Ntabanganyimana
Justin, Nyirimanzi Mathias na KOAIMU SURE batitabye. Iburanisha ryimuriwe ku wa
07/02/2025 kugira ngo abo Mutabaruka Esperee n’abo Bizimungu Daniel bahagarariye bitabe
ubwabo, kandi abatitabye uko ari batatu bongere bahamagazwe, hazanageragezwe inzira yo
gukemura ikibazo mu bwumvikane.
[16] Ku wa 07/02/2025, ababuranyi baritabye kandi bunganiwe nka mbere, bemeranwa
n’Urukiko ko hahita hatangira kugeragezwa inzira yo gukemura mu bwumvikane amakimbirane
bafitanye, kandi umucamanza wagombaga kubaburanisha abibaberamo umuhuza. Uwo munsi
ubuhuza ntibwarangiye, bumvikana kuzabukomeza ku wa 07/03/2025, bongera guhura ku wa
11/04/2025, bwongera gusubukurwa mu baburanyi hiyongereyemo Kandamutsa Beathe
wagobotse ku bushake kandi busozwa ku wa 07/11/2025, iteka ababuranyi bose bakenewe nk’uko
byabaga byumvikanyweho bakaba barabaga bahari kandi bunganiwe na ba Avoka babo. Isomwa
mu ruhame ry’icyemezo gisoza urubanza ryashyizwe ku wa 28/11/2025.
[17] Ku wa 07/11/2025, ubuhuza bwakomereje ku cyicaro cy’Urukiko buyobowe
n’umucamanza, hari ababuranyi bose uretse uhagarariye KOAIMU SURE wari urwaye. Kuri uwo
munsi ababuranyi bageze ku bwumvikane ku ngingo zose zaburanwagaho muri uru rubanza maze
hamwe n’umuhuza abitabiriye ubuhuza bose kuri uwo munsi bashyira umukono ku nyandiko
yiswe “Inyandiko y’ubwumvikane mu buhuza burangiza urubanza RCAA 00003/2023/CA”. Muri
ayo masezerano yanashyizwe nyuma muri dosiye y’uru rubanza, ababuranyi bumvikanye ko
Zimurinda yemeye guha umuryango wa Mushirarungu uhagarariwe na Kandamutsa Beata
amafaranga miliyoni enye z’amafaranga y’u Rwanda (4.000.000Frw), akanatanga umurima
uzahabwa umukobw wa mukuru we witwa Nyiranshimiyimana Esperance, bitarenze tariki
05/04/2026; Gukora umuhango w’ubwiyunge kandi bigakorerwa mu muryango haba ubusabane,
umukobwa wabo Nyiranshimiyimana Esperance n’umugabo we bakazaza kwerekana abana
bibarutse ndetse akaba ari wo munsi azishyuriraho amafaranga yavuzwe haruguru akanatanga
umurima uzajya uhingirwa abuzukuru bakomoka kuri Mushirarungu. Muri aya masezerano kandi
humvikanwe ko ubu bwumvikane busoje burundu imanza zari zishingiye kw’izugura ry’isambu
ya Bufigi ari zo: RCAA 00003/2023; RC 00001/2021/HC/RSZ; RC 00039/2019/HC/RSZ; RC
00056/2018/TGI/KNG na RC 7256/R31-RCA 0217/04/TP/KBY. Urukiko rwamenyeshereje
ababuranyi ahabugenewe muri sisitemu ya IECMS ko isomwa mu ruhame ry’icyemezo gisoza uru
rubanza rishyizwe ku wa 28/11/2025.

II. IKIBAZO KIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISESENGURA RYACYO
Kumenya niba Urukiko rwaha agaciro amasezerano y’ubwumvikane mu buhuza bwabaye ku wa
07/11/2025 hagati y’ababuranyi bose muri uru rubanza.
[18] Ingingo ya 9, igika cya 3, y’Itegeko Nº 22/2018 ryo ku wa 29/04/2018 ryerekeye
imiburanishirize y’imanza z’imbonezamubano, iz’ubucuruzi, iz’umurimo n’iz’ubutegetsi iteganya
ibikurikira: “Umucamanza ashobora gushishikariza ababuranyi gukoresha ubwunzi iyo abona ko
ari bwo buryo buboneye mu kurangiza impaka. Ashobora kubunga ubwe cyangwa akabohereza
mu bwunzi, agasubika urubanza mu gihe ubwunzi burimo gukorwa”.
[19] Ingingo ya 64 y’Itegeko Nº 45/2011 ryo ku wa 25/11/2011 rigenga amasezerano, iteganya
ibikurikira: “Amasezerano akozwe ku buryo bukurikije amategeko aba itegeko ku bayagiranye.
(…)”.
[20] Nk’uko byasobanuwe haruguru, ku matariki atandukanye hagati y’ababuranyi bose muri
uru rubanza habaye ubuhuzwa bwayobowe n’umucanza Kamere Emmanuel bihitiyemo, maze
busozwa n’ubwumvikane bugaragara mu nyandiko y’amasezerano yavuzwe haruguru
yashyizweho umukono ku wa 07/11/2025.
[21] Urukiko rurasanga nta mpamvu yatuma rudaha agaciro amasezerano y’ubwumvikane
yashyizweho umukono ku wa 07/11/2025. Rusanze kandi aya masezerano akemuye ikibazo
ababuranyi bari bamaranye igihe kinini, akaba asoje urubanza RCAA 00003/2023/CA rwari mu
Rukiko rw’Ubujurire hagati y’ababuranyi bose ari bo: Zimurinda Charles, Musabyimana
Chrisostome, Bizimungu Daniel, Dushimimana Immaculée, Kabataka Fulgence, Mukabarema
Esperance, Mutabaruka Rosette, Mutabaruka Clementine, Mutabaruka Garasiya, Mutabaruka
Victoire, Mutabaruka Dieudonne, Mutabaruka Esperée, Mutabaruka Desire, Ntabanganyimana
Justin, Nyirimanzi Mathias, Mukamugema Felesita, KOAIM SURE, Bikorimana Etienne,
Uzabumwana Fidele, Nyiramugisha Monique na Kandamutsa Beathe, kandi akaba agomba
kubahirizwa n’impande zombi zayagiranye nk’uko biteganywa n’ingingo ya 64 y’Itegeko Nº
45/2011 ryo ku wa 25/11/2011 rigenga amasezerano ryibukijwe haruguru.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[22] Rwemeje ko ubwumvikane bwasojwe bukanashyirwaho umukono ku wa 07/11/2025
hagati y’ababuranyi bose muri uru rubanza busoje burundu urubanza RCAA 00003/2023/CA rwari
mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, bukaba bugomba gushyirwa mu bikorwa.
[23] Ruvuze ko amagarama yatanzwe muri uru rubanza ahwanye n’ibyarukozwemo.
